info.name: Event Hub - Contact API
info.description: Postman collection for Contact Us form endpoint.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Jane Doe",
  "email": "jane.doe@example.com",
  "phone": "+1-555-0101",
  "subject": "Question about booking",
  "message": "Hi team, I want to know if your venue supports 300 guests."
}

request.description: Required fields: name, email, subject, message. Optional: phone.
